items.title: Read 12 books this year
items.description: A library isn't built from titles, but from hours stolen back from the noise. One book a month.

milestones.title: First volume shelved
milestones.reward: An unhurried hour at a bookstore

milestones.title: Halfway through the year
milestones.reward: Buy the book you've been eyeing online

milestones.title: Tireless chronicler
milestones.reward: An evening at a literary café

items.title: 30 training sessions
items.description: You don't need the champion's armor — you need consistency. Three workouts a week for ten weeks.

milestones.title: Body remembers the rhythm
milestones.reward: A pair of new running shoes

milestones.title: Veteran's stamina
milestones.reward: Sign up for a local race

milestones.title: Untiring knight
milestones.reward: A full day at the spa

items.title: A thousand coins in the chest
items.description: Fill the chest with €1,000 of extra savings — small deposits that become treasure.

milestones.title: First gold seal
milestones.reward: Confirm the chest is officially open

milestones.title: Halfway haul
milestones.reward: Treat yourself to a small indulgence

milestones.title: Almost legendary
milestones.reward: Book the experience you've been delaying
